name: foundation
statements: CREATE TABLE schema_migrations (version INTEGER PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL CHECK (version > 0), name TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (length(name) BETWEEN 1 AND 128), checksum TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (length(checksum) = 64), applied_at TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (applied_at GLOB '????-??-??T??:??:??Z' OR applied_at GLOB '????-??-??T??:??:??.???Z'), app_version TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (length(app_version) BETWEEN 1 AND 128))

CREATE TABLE food_sources (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL CHECK (length(id) BETWEEN 1 AND 128), provider TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (length(provider) > 0), provider_record_id TEXT, dataset_version TEXT, source_url TEXT, license_id TEXT, attribution TEXT, retrieved_at TEXT CHECK (retrieved_at IS NULL OR retrieved_at GLOB '????-??-??T??:??:??Z' OR retrieved_at GLOB '????-??-??T??:??:??.???Z'), payload_hash TEXT)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX food_sources_external_identity ON food_sources(provider, provider_record_id, dataset_version) WHERE provider_record_id IS NOT NULL AND dataset_version IS NOT NULL

CREATE TABLE foods (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL CHECK (length(id) BETWEEN 1 AND 128), canonical_name TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (length(canonical_name) > 0), normalized_name TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (length(normalized_name) > 0), origin TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (origin IN ('seed', 'user', 'accepted_online')), current_revision_id TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (length(current_revision_id) BETWEEN 1 AND 128), archived_at TEXT CHECK (archived_at IS NULL OR archived_at GLOB '????-??-??T??:??:??Z' OR archived_at GLOB '????-??-??T??:??:??.???Z'), created_at TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (created_at GLOB '????-??-??T??:??:??Z' OR created_at GLOB '????-??-??T??:??:??.???Z'), updated_at TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (updated_at GLOB '????-??-??T??:??:??Z' OR updated_at GLOB '????-??-??T??:??:??.???Z'), FOREIGN KEY (id, current_revision_id) REFERENCES food_revisions(food_id, id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED)

CREATE TABLE food_revisions (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL CHECK (length(id) BETWEEN 1 AND 128), food_id TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (length(food_id) BETWEEN 1 AND 128), revision_number INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (typeof(revision_number) = 'integer' AND revision_number > 0), source_id TEXT, basis_quantity_scaled INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (typeof(basis_quantity_scaled) = 'integer' AND basis_quantity_scaled BETWEEN 1 AND 9007199254740991), basis_unit TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (basis_unit IN ('gram', 'millilitre', 'each', 'serving')), calories_kcal_scaled INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (typeof(calories_kcal_scaled) = 'integer' AND calories_kcal_scaled BETWEEN 0 AND 9007199254740991), protein_g_scaled INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (typeof(protein_g_scaled) = 'integer' AND protein_g_scaled BETWEEN 0 AND 9007199254740991), carbohydrates_g_scaled INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (typeof(carbohydrates_g_scaled) = 'integer' AND carbohydrates_g_scaled BETWEEN 0 AND 9007199254740991), fat_g_scaled INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (typeof(fat_g_scaled) = 'integer' AND fat_g_scaled BETWEEN 0 AND 9007199254740991), fibre_g_scaled INTEGER CHECK (fibre_g_scaled IS NULL OR (typeof(fibre_g_scaled) = 'integer' AND fibre_g_scaled BETWEEN 0 AND 9007199254740991)), sugar_g_scaled INTEGER CHECK (sugar_g_scaled IS NULL OR (typeof(sugar_g_scaled) = 'integer' AND sugar_g_scaled BETWEEN 0 AND 9007199254740991)), sodium_mg_scaled INTEGER CHECK (sodium_mg_scaled IS NULL OR (typeof(sodium_mg_scaled) = 'integer' AND sodium_mg_scaled BETWEEN 0 AND 9007199254740991)), user_modified INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (user_modified IN (0, 1)), created_at TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (created_at GLOB '????-??-??T??:??:??Z' OR created_at GLOB '????-??-??T??:??:??.???Z'), CONSTRAINT food_revisions_food_revision_unique UNIQUE(food_id, revision_number), CONSTRAINT food_revisions_food_id_unique UNIQUE(food_id, id), FOREIGN KEY (food_id) REFERENCES foods(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED, FOREIGN KEY (source_id) REFERENCES food_sources(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT)
CREATE TRIGGER food_revisions_immutable_update BEFORE UPDATE ON food_revisions BEGIN SELECT RAISE(ABORT, 'food revisions are immutable'); END
CREATE TRIGGER food_revisions_immutable_delete BEFORE DELETE ON food_revisions BEGIN SELECT RAISE(ABORT, 'food revisions are immutable'); END

CREATE TABLE food_aliases (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL CHECK (length(id) BETWEEN 1 AND 128), food_id TEXT NOT NULL, alias TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (length(alias) > 0), normalized_alias TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (length(normalized_alias) > 0), locale TEXT, origin TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (origin IN ('seed', 'user', 'accepted_online')), created_at TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (created_at GLOB '????-??-??T??:??:??Z' OR created_at GLOB '????-??-??T??:??:??.???Z'), FOREIGN KEY (food_id) REFERENCES foods(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX food_aliases_food_normalized_locale_unique ON food_aliases(food_id, normalized_alias, COALESCE(locale, ''))

CREATE TABLE food_portions (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL CHECK (length(id) BETWEEN 1 AND 128), food_id TEXT NOT NULL, label TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (length(label) > 0), normalized_label TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (length(normalized_label) > 0), quantity_scaled INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (typeof(quantity_scaled) = 'integer' AND quantity_scaled BETWEEN 1 AND 9007199254740991), equivalent_quantity_scaled INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (typeof(equivalent_quantity_scaled) = 'integer' AND equivalent_quantity_scaled BETWEEN 1 AND 9007199254740991), equivalent_unit TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (equivalent_unit IN ('gram', 'millilitre', 'each')), source_id TEXT, created_at TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (created_at GLOB '????-??-??T??:??:??Z' OR created_at GLOB '????-??-??T??:??:??.???Z'), FOREIGN KEY (food_id) REFERENCES foods(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT, FOREIGN KEY (source_id) REFERENCES food_sources(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX food_portions_food_label_unique ON food_portions(food_id, normalized_label)
